details: The agent ran multiple kubectl-axi commands against the cluster (triage, deploy, deploy view, pods, pods view) and correctly identified both required facts: (1) the rollout is stuck with Progressing=False/ProgressDeadlineExceeded, and (2) the root cause is that the v2 image 'nginx:2.0-does-not-exist' cannot be pulled (ImagePullBackOff/NotFound), leaving the old v1 pods (nginx:1.27-alpine) still serving traffic.
